dependencies.name: tomlplusplus
dependencies.reason: The display-free PD1 configuration module directly uses the system toml++ library for strict version-1 parsing; no supported minimum has been measured.

dependencies.name: dbus
dependencies.reason: The Accepted component model publishes typed settings snapshots over D-Bus; the interface and target remain unstabilized.

dependencies.name: libxcb
dependencies.reason: PD1 targets X11 and assigns XSettings publication to settingsd; production linkage is not implemented or measured.

unresolved.reason: The JSON implementation library for the later theme-token resolver remains unselected.
The implementation must establish whether standard-library facilities are sufficient before declaring another dependency.
